info.title: Event Management API
info.description: API documentation for the Event Management System. This system allows managing yearly events with all their associated content including summaries, themes, programmes, speakers, sponsors, FAQs, media, galleries, and attendances.

servers.description: Same host as Swagger UI (use this so Try it out hits the app you opened in the browser)

get.description: Returns a list of all events

post.description: Creates a new event. Cover image: send `cover_image` as a URL/path string in JSON, or upload a file as `cover_image` in multipart/form-data.

get.description: Returns the current year's published event with all related data
Returns an event for a specific year with all related data
Returns a single event with all related data

put.description: Updates an existing event. Cover image: JSON `cover_image` string (URL/path) or null to clear; or multipart file `cover_image`. Omit to keep current.

delete.description: Deletes an event and all related data

post.description: Creates a theme row. List themes for an event with GET /api/themes?event_id={eventUuid}. Fetch one theme by its id with GET /api/themes/{id}.

get.description: Required query `event_id` is the event UUID.
Required query `event_id` is the event UUID. Returns summary rows (UI title: **Event summaries**). Each item: id, event_id, `summary`, created_at, updated_at.

post.description: Body includes `event_id` (event UUID) and `summary` (string). UI title: **Event summaries**.

get.description: Required query `event_id` is the event UUID.

post.description: Body includes `event_id` (event UUID) and programme fields.

event_pdf.description: Google Drive link to the programme PDF

get.description: Required query `event_id` is the event UUID.

post.description: Body includes `event_id` (event UUID). Use multipart/form-data to upload `photo` as a file, or JSON without a file.

get.description: Required query `event_id` is the event UUID.

post.description: Body includes `event_id` (event UUID). Use multipart/form-data to upload `logo` as a file, or JSON without a file.

get.description: Path `id` is the summary UUID (not the event UUID).

get.summary: List all themes for an event
get.description: Required query `event_id` is the event UUID. Returns theme rows for that event (UI title: **Event themes**). Fields per item: id, event_id, theme, description, created_at, updated_at.
Path `id` is the theme UUID.

put.description: Partial update: send `theme` and/or `description`. At least one field required.

get.description: Path `id` is the programme UUID (not the event UUID).

event_pdf.description: Google Drive link to the programme PDF

get.description: Path `id` is the speaker UUID (not the event UUID).
Path `id` is the sponsor UUID (not the event UUID).
Required query `event_id` is the event UUID. Each item: `id`, `title`, `file_path`, `description`.

post.description: Optional `type`: image, video, or document (default document). Response shape matches list items.

put.description: Partial update: at least one of `title`, `file_path`, `description`.

get.description: Returns rows from `event_resources`: id, event_id, title, description, file_path, file_type, url, created_at, updated_at. Filter by optional `event_id` (UUID) or `year`; omit both to list all.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Event year (used when event_id is not set)

get.summary: List gallery images for an event
get.description: Required query `event_id` is the event UUID.

post.summary: Upload gallery images for an event

put.description: JSON: `url` and/or `order`. Multipart: optional `image` file replaces the stored file.

get.description: Required query `event_id` is the event UUID.

post.description: Upserts by `event_id` + `email`: creates a new row or updates the existing registration for that pair.

200.description: Attendance already existed and was updated

get.description: Returns a list of all topics with their speakers

post.description: Creates a new topic for an event

get.description: Returns a single topic with all speakers

delete.description: Deletes a topic (speakers will have topic_id set to null)

cover_image.description: Stored cover reference: absolute URL, `/storage/...` path, or relative path on the public disk.

cover_image_url.description: Resolved public URL for the cover image (computed from `cover_image`).

summaries.description: Event summaries — use the UI title **Event summaries**. Present when the event is loaded with relations (e.g. GET /api/events/{id}).

programmes.description: Event programmes (schedule). Present when the event is loaded with relations.

speakers.description: Speakers for this event. Present when the event is loaded with relations.

sponsors.description: Sponsors for this event. Present when the event is loaded with relations.

themes.description: Event themes — use the UI title **Event themes**. Present when the event is loaded with relations (e.g. GET /api/events/{id}).

EventMedia.title: Media
EventMedia.description: Event media as returned by GET/POST/PUT /api/media.

EventProgramme.title: Event programmes
EventProgramme.description: One programme (schedule) row for an event.

event_pdf.description: Google Drive link to the programme PDF

EventSummary.title: Event summaries
EventSummary.description: One summary row. Lists use the UI title **Event summaries**; payload field is `summary` (text).

summary.example: Join us for the annual conference...

EventTheme.title: Event themes
EventTheme.description: One theme row. Lists on the event use the UI title **Event themes**.

cover_image.description: Public URL or `/storage/...` path to use as cover (not used when uploading `cover_image` as a file in multipart). On PUT, send null to clear.

content.example: Exploring how AI is transforming industries and creating new opportunities...
Exploring how AI is transforming industries...

tags.name: Topics
tags.description: Topic management endpoints - one topic can have multiple speakers

tags.name: Speakers
tags.description: Event speakers: list and create by event id, update and delete by speaker id

tags.name: Sponsors
tags.description: Event sponsors: list and create by event id, update and delete by sponsor id

tags.name: FAQ
tags.description: Event FAQs: list by event UUID, create, update, delete by id

tags.name: Gallery
tags.description: Event gallery images: list by event UUID, upload, update, delete by id

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Event media (videos, documents, images): list by event UUID; create and update; responses use id, title, file_path, description

tags.name: Attendances
tags.description: Event attendance registrations: list by event UUID, register (upsert by email), get, update, delete by id

tags.name: Event Resources
tags.description: event_resources table: list (by event_id or year), create, get by id, update, delete

tags.name: Event programmes
tags.description: Schedule items: list and create by event id, update and delete by programme id

tags.name: Event summaries
tags.description: Event summary text (list by event, update by id)

tags.name: Event themes
tags.description: Event themes and descriptions (list, create, update, delete)
